summary: Iteration-7 e2e validation of scripture expansion (208 -> 264 verses), multi-word search fix, and Tamil/Telugu/Kannada transliteration display. Backend: 43/43 pytest pass (36 pre-existing + 7 new TestIter7Expansion covering 264-count aggregation, multi-word 'soul eternal' >=20 hits, vasudhaiva kutumbakam -> av-4-3 Vedas, Mahamrityunjaya -> sp-2-3 Puranas, bg-2-27 has >=2 transliteration languages, taitt-3 matr-devo-bhava, public multi-word). Frontend Playwright: Landing hero renders '260+ Verses' & '16 Sacred Texts'. Public search 'soul eternal' returns Bhagavad/Upanishad hits; 'Guruvayur temple' -> Narayaneeyam. Admin login -> /dashboard, Daily Verse card renders, stats show 260+ / 16 / AI. Browse lists all 16 scriptures. BG Ch2 (Sankhya Yoga) now shows 15 verses (expanded from previous ~7). Verse cards show SCRIPT row with 5 buttons: Malayalam, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada + Reset; Tamil click renders Tamil script (க்லைவ்யம்...). Verse card actions: Listen(+voice dropdown), AI Explanation, Community, Suggest Correction, plus header icons (copy, image, share, bookmark). Plans tab lists 6 plans (Gita 7-day, Upanishad, Kerala, Yoga Path, Divine Feminine, Karkkidakam-30).

minor.issue: Response items lack top-level `total_verses` count (all None) even though total_chapters is populated. Frontend must aggregate via /chapters endpoint. Consider adding total_verses to /scriptures response to reduce chatter.

issues: Label shows 'Community (...)' with ellipsis until panel expanded / count fetched - already flagged in iter-5, still present.

action_items: (Optional) Populate `total_verses` in GET /api/scriptures aggregation so clients don't need per-scripture /chapters roundtrips to compute 264.
(Carried) Reactivate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY to enable AI search / explanation / TTS.
(Carried) Fix Community label ellipsis: pre-fetch count or default to '(0)'.
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-word keyword_search now splits on whitespace and ranks by number of matching tokens - verified working. Still no stemming/plurals: e.g. 'eternal souls' with plural 's' will match 'soul' since we substring on token, but 'meditations' vs 'meditation' relies on substring inclusion which works one way only. Acceptable for MVP.

server.py continues to grow past ~900 lines with data expansions; scripture_data_expansion.py and scripture_data_kerala_expansion.py should be consolidated into a single data package or moved under backend/data/.
Not all newly-added verses have all 5 transliterations (per note - expected). UI correctly hides buttons that have no data via existence check - good.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of iteration-7 acceptance checkpoints verified (landing 260+/16, public multi-word search, Guruvayur, admin login, dashboard stats, 16 texts in Browse, BG-2 15 verses, 5-language transliteration buttons on expanded verses, Tamil click renders Tamil script, 6 reading plans).

seed_data_creation: No new seed data this iteration (annotations/corrections TEST_ docs may still linger from iter-5).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 review checkpoints from iteration_7 are green. New backend tests in TestIter7Expansion class cover 264-count, multi-word search, vasudhaiva/Mahamrityunjaya famous verses, and transliteration language presence on bg-2-27. Transliteration UI selector: SCRIPT row with buttons 'Malayalam' 'Hindi' 'Tamil' 'Telugu' 'Kannada' 'Reset' - present per-verse when transliterations dict has any entries; active language button gets orange background. BG chapter 2 verse_ids present: bg-2-3, bg-2-7, bg-2-11, bg-2-13, bg-2-14, bg-2-17, bg-2-19, bg-2-20, bg-2-22, bg-2-27, bg-2-47, bg-2-48, bg-2-55, bg-2-62, bg-2-63.
rca_of_the_issue: No blocking issues. Publish-ready from testing perspective. Only outstanding items are external LLM key inactivation (503 on AI/TTS - documented as pre-existing) and cosmetic Community(...) label from iter-5.
